Kasper Spindler ← Back

Interactive Copenhagen University grades dashboard for 2020 to 2025. Search by course name, institute, faculty, or course code. Select courses to compare average grades and inspect term-level grading history.

Copenhagen University Grades Dashboard

This dashboard contains KU exam-grade data from 2020-2025 for graded exams with at least five participants. Data was collected in May 2026. The data is scraped from the KU course catalogue and KU’s course-level grade statistics, then matched by course, year, and exam code. Pass/fail exams and exams without numeric grades are excluded. Institute, faculty, and course names are included with the language found on STADS. In figure 3&4 aggregate GPA's are calculated by summing all recieved grades and dividing by amount of grades given. There is a button to toggle including failing grades in these aggregations.
